name: Yonah
description: [Nier](https://anilist.co/character/138303/Nier)'s fragile sister. She loves Nier more than anything and is extremely devoted and supportive, despite his long absences. Due to her frail health, she mostly stays at home, frequently writing letters.

name: Yoshino Takatsuki
description: Yoshino, the other protagonist, is a tall, masculine child who at the beginning of Wandering Son is a fifth grader in Shuichi's class. Otherwise known as Takatsuki-kun by their classmates, with an honorific used mainly with boys, Yoshino wishes to be a boy. Yoshino usually refrains from dressing in traditionally feminine clothes, such as skirts or dresses. Despite this, Yoshino's mother insists on buying such clothes for them. name: Youko Morinomiya
description: The chairwoman of the Morinomiya School. After she lost her son and daughter-in-law in a plane crash, she offered to become the guardian of Ryuuichi and his brother, Kotarou.

name: Yousei-san
description: A race of strange fairies who have permanent smiles on their faces. Despite their cute appearance, they possess advanced technology, though their products tend to favour quantity over quality. They often request sweets from the main character in exchange for their work.

name: Yuki
description: Ayakashi, a Kangitsune that Seika has been using since before she was reincarnated. She is a useless mascot character with possessiveness and supernatural powers, but she loves Seika from the bottom of his heart. In the past, the human body was like an adult woman, but in this world, for some reason, it has become smaller overall. She usually hides in Seika's hair in the form of Kangitsune.

name: Yuki Amane
description: ~!She is the future wife of Hashida Itaru, with whom she will have a daughter named Suzuha. In the Alpha world line, her husband invents a time machine in 2036, which Suzuha uses to travel back in time. !~ ~!In the manga "Boukan no Rebellion", it's revealed that Yuki is killed by Tennouji Nae, moments before Suzuha uses the time machine. name: Yuuna Okuyama
description: Yunna is a classmate of Souta. She bullies him but actually really likes him. Kyoko Hori is her role model. ~!In the manga timeskip she's best friend and in a relationship with Souta Hori.!~

name: Z
description: Zephyr, also known as Z was the leader of the Neo Marines and the main antagonist of the One Piece Film: Z. He was once a Marine admiral and instructor before his resignation. During his time as a Marine, he was very popular with his subordinates. name: Agni
description: Agni is the Goddess of Fire. She gave Mukouda her blessing so that she could get offerings from him. Agni likes otherworld alcohol, especially beer.

name: Chie Hori
description: Chie is a human photographer and information broker. She is a long-time friend of Shuu Tsukiyama, aware of his secret but uninterested in exposing him as a Ghoul. At his request, she serves as an informant to Kaneki's group. (Source: MAL) She seeks out the members of the Quinx Squad, and offers to sell them information pertaining to Torso. This is because she has an unusual interest in their leader, Sasaki.

name: Chuchu

She serves as the de facto leader of the band and enjoys the deep trust of her fellow members. name: Colette
description: Colette is a young doctor. She is one of the five disciples of Doctor Anno. Even when tired and facing difficulties, Colette remains to be a very kind and caring doctor.
